QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_13

question.text: Under the All Citizens Model, what is the eligible age range for joining NPS?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under the All Citizens Model, any Indian citizen aged 18 to 70 years can voluntarily join NPS. **The Trap:** The upper age limit was revised to 70 from the earlier 65. Many older references still cite 60 or 65. **Cross-Exam Context:** Those joining after age 65 have different exit rules. They must stay for at least 3 years and max equity is 50% (Active) or 15% (Auto). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For clients aged 65-70, clarify the modified rules: 3-year minimum tenure, lower equity cap, and same exit norms thereafter.
